TextView.android:text:
Exercise

1.Track
A running track at least thrice a week will really help one improve fitness and stamina.

2.Raising weights
Raising weights at least 5kg weights not more not less will help exercise the body well and build strength.

3.Skipping Rope
Increases heart rate and makes you used to it and can really help prevent illness.

4.Push-ups
Helps strengthen arms chest and shoulders and improves body strength.

5.Squats
Helps build strong legs and improves balance and movement.

6.Plank
Helps strengthen the core and improves posture when done regularly.

7.Stretching
Helps prevent injuries and improves flexibility before and after exercise.

8.Walking
Walking daily helps improve heart health and keeps the body active.
